description: Side-scrolling locomotion: horizontal run, gravity, jump, and coyote-time. Sets velocity for a following velocity integrator. 1.1.0 treats entity.state.__onGround (set by a later tilemap-collide/solid-collide behavior) as grounded, so a tile floor or solid body satisfies the jump test. 1.2.0 adds the genre-feel layer as OPTIONAL params, each defaulting to the original behavior: run acceleration/friction (accel/friction), variable jump height (jumpCutMultiplier), jump buffering (jumpBuffer), and apex hang (apexGravityMult/apexThreshold).

jumpSpeed.description: Upward jump launch velocity in px/sec.

maxFall.description: Terminal fall speed in px/sec (0 = uncapped).

accel.description: Horizontal acceleration in px/sec² toward the target speed (0 = instant vx).

friction.description: Horizontal deceleration in px/sec² when there is no input (0 = use accel; only applies when accel > 0).

jumpCutMultiplier.description: vy is multiplied by this on jump-release while rising (1 = no cut / fixed-impulse jump).

jumpBuffer.description: Seconds a jump press is remembered so it fires on landing (0 = off).

apexGravityMult.description: Gravity multiplier while |vy| < apexThreshold (1 = no change).

apexThreshold.description: |vy| in px/sec under which apexGravityMult applies (0 = off).
